rewritten_requirements: The system shall expand the state machine to include events not identified from interaction diagrams.
The system shall refine complex nested states at a later stage.
The system shall include an Active state that encompasses Advert Preparation, Scheduling and Running Adverts states.
The system shall compare the state machine with use cases to ensure that constraints on class behavior satisfy requirements.
The system shall allow a campaign to be cancelled while it is in the Commissioned or Active state.
The system shall calculate cancellation costs for billing to the client when a campaign is cancelled.
The system shall cancel advertisement schedules when a campaign is active and it is being cancelled.
The system shall perform exit activities for concurrent substates when a transition like campaignCompleted fires.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should be able to expand the state machine to include events not identified from interaction diagrams.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This would need to be expanded in order to reflect any events that have not been identified from the interaction diagrams,

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should be able to refine complex nested states at a later stage.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Complex nested states can be refined at this stage.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should include an Active state that encompasses Advert Preparation, Scheduling and Running Adverts states.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A review of the state machine in Fig. 11.18 results in the addition of the Active state to encompass the states Advert Preparation, Scheduling and Running Adverts (shown in the revised state machine in Fig. 11.19).

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should compare the state machine with use cases to ensure that constraints on class behavior satisfy requirements.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The state machine is then compared to use cases in order to check that the constraints on class behaviour shown in the state machine satisfy the requirements documented in the use case.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A campaign can be cancelled while it is in the Commissioned or Active state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Let us suppose that further investigation of behaviour that can affect a campaign reveals that in some circumstances a campaign can be cancelled. This is not permitted after a campaign has been completed but a campaign can be cancelled while it is in the Commissioned state or in the Active state.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Cancellation costs should be calculated for billing to the client when a campaign is cancelled.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the campaign is active then advertisement schedules are also cancelled. A final state machine that includes this additional requirement is shown in Fig. 11.20.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Advertisement schedules should be cancelled when a campaign is active and it is being cancelled.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the campaign is active then advertisement schedules are also cancelled.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Exit activities for concurrent substates should be performed when a transition like campaignCompleted fires.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When a transition like this fires, any exit activities for the other concurrent substates that are occupied are performed.
